features.name: memory array with random initialize in initial block
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array (reg [7:0] Memory[0:15]) with random initialization using a for-loop inside an initial block guarded by `ifdef RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT

features.name: random memory initialization with computed bit slice
features.description: Code should include a memory initialization where a random value is sliced (e.g., _RAND_0[7:0]) and assigned to each memory element via for-loop iteration
